form.formComment: Back from a spell of 14 months. Won two starts back when well in the market at Sandown over 595m. Last start finished 4th in a OPEN on March 2 2025 over 455m at Murray Bridge behind I'm A Mustang beaten 10 lengths (26.28). Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished second at Horsham in 23.55 last time but the start prior clocked a slick 23.96 over 425m finishing second at this track. Looms as the one to beat this time.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Colliding and fell in catching pen.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.71) when eighth over 410m at Horsham in a Free For All. Has three wins and three placings from eight starts from the draw. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 13 over 390m at Shepparton in a Grade 4/5. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Finished fourth (23.64) last start at Horsham. Prior to that had recorded three minor placings in a row. Has a squeeze box to navigate and needs to find best form to feature.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 6th on April 9 over 410m at Horsham behind Liddell beaten 14 lengths (23.97) in a Grade 5. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 5 lengths at Warragul over 400m (22.96) beating Faye Valentine in Grade 5 on April 10. Unbeaten in two starts from this draw. Key runner.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 450m at Ballarat. That followed a win two back in 25.96 beating Aussie Flame over 450m at Shepparton. Tested under these conditions.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Geelong over 400m in 22.67. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when eighth over 390m at Shepparton at Grade 5 level. Can't recommend in this field.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing eighth (20.76) at Capalaba before going for a four months spell. Looks a key runner while fresh.
